tools.name: fullNameParsedSimilarityKey.getfullnameparsedmatch
tools.description: Gets a similarity key for matching purposes for parsed full name data, where the first name and last name are split into separate fields in the source data rather than combined.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
